MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DANIEL BACON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: James McPherson of Valinoti & Dito (986.1338) for defendant and moving party; Patricia Kennedy Fyfe of the Law Offices of Patricia Kennedy Fyfe (650.652.3494) for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: Defendant's demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege date of the actual injury. Order signed after hearing. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Tamara Willat-Harrison, CSR #4609
